deals.title: 50% OFF your entire order 📍 Potato Factory – Tyson’
deals.description: 🎉 GRAND OPENING PARTY 🎉 This Saturday | 5 PM – 9 PM 🔥 🎧 Live DJ 🍦 Free Ice Cream for Everyone 🎁 First 100 customers after 5 PM get a FREE item! 🔥 From 5 PM until closing: 50% OFF your entire order 📍 Potato Factory – Tyson’s Corner Bring your friends and celebrate with us! 🥔🍔🔥 #PotatoFactory #GrandOpening #TysonsCorner #DMVFood #FoodTrailer Quelle: TikTok @potatofactoryva.

deals.title: if you’re in vienna this saturday, be here 🌞 SOUL
deals.description: if you’re in vienna this saturday, be here 🌞 SOUL. Rooftop Dayparty 📍 Aurora Rooftop Bar 🕑 2PM–8PM ☕ Special: free iced coffee tickets in bio ↓ www.soul-dayparty.at #viennaevents #rooftopparty #dayparty #vienna #housemusic Quelle: TikTok @soul.dayparty.

deals.title: Europe’s biggest free open-air festival is back in Vienna
deals.description: Europe’s biggest free open-air festival is back in Vienna. 🎶 From July 3–5, 2026, the Donauinselfest turns the Danube Island into a 4.5 km long festival area — completely free to enter. What to expect: 3 days of festival feeling 14 stages around 200 acts over 700 hours of programme music, comedy, action, sports, family activities, food, design market & more The programme starts around midday and continues into the night, with some activities already beginning earlier on Friday. deals.title: @frishwienxtra Angebot
deals.description: Im Juni warten 2 Termine auf euch und das natürlich kostenlos und beide Termine finden im altbekannten Sigmund-Freud-Park statt. 🌳 Schreibt uns in die Kommentare, bei welchem Screening wir euch treffen können! 😊🍿 #frishwienxtra #openair #sunsetcinema #openairkino #kostenlos Quelle: TikTok @frishwienxtra.
